haiku:
Ripe berries glisten,
Fluffy sweetness fills the air,
Joy wrapped in each slice.
Happy #NationalRaspberryCakeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Pink tongues taste the breeze,
Laughter echoes through the park,
Joyful faces beam.
Happy #StickOutYourTongueDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Pastels swirl and twirl,
Ballet dreams take to the stage,
Laughter fills the room.
#HappyBirthdayEdgarDegas from @ClamBakeSanta
